original: Roman Emperor Constantius gives grand circus and theater shows to mark 30th year of his reign as Caesar in Arles
Al-Hussein (Al-Ḥusayn ibn) and his followers are killed at Karbala by the army of Yazid, the Umayyad caliph, on their way to Kufa

West Frisian seawall breaks, flooding northern Netherlands
Edward Seymour, 1st Duke of Somerset, is dismissed for mismanagement as Treasurer and Lord Protector of the Realm and imprisoned
Battle of Dormans: Roman Catholic forces under Duke Henry of Guise defeat the French Protestants, capturing Philippe de Mornay among others
German Count Johan Casimir occupies Ghent with 500 horsemen, subsidized by England
Saxon army occupies Prague
Advisement to view a rhinoceros in a tavern in Ludgate Hill, London published - 1st rhinoceros in Europe since 1515

French government proclaims strike on banknotes

The Great Hurricane of 1780 hits Barbados and goes on to kill 20,000 to 30,000 people in the Caribbean, making it the Atlantic's deadliest recorded hurricane

Convention of Alkmaar: British-Russian invasion army departs Holland
1st non-Indian settlement indigenous Choctaw Territory  of Oklahumma

1st written account of a Canadian football game

African-American inventor Isaac R. Johnson patents the bicycle frame

In Manchuria, Russia captures the major city of Mukden, part of their own plan to take over the whole province

Coup under Gen Giorgios Kondylis in favor of Greek monarchy
League of Nations denounces Italian invasion of Abyssinia
RAF bombs Piraeus to prevent German heavy armor advancing

1st National Film Awards (India): "Shyamchi Aai" wins the Golden Lotus

USSR performs nuclear test at Novaya Zemlya USSR

US performs nuclear test at Nevada Test Site
